task_goal: Open the file task.html in Downloads in the file manager; when prompted open it with Chrome. Then click the button 5 times, remember the numbers displayed, and enter their product in the form.
task_goal_rewrite: The task.html file located in the Downloads folder is opened in the Chrome browser, the button on the page is clicked exactly 5 times, and the product of the 5 numbers displayed after each click is entered into the page's form input field.

checkpoints.description: The task.html file from the Downloads folder is successfully opened in the Chrome browser.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing Chrome displaying the task.html page with the interactive button and form input field; trace evidence of selecting Chrome as the application to open task.html from the file manager.

checkpoints.description: The button on the task.html page is clicked exactly 5 times.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Trace log showing 5 distinct click actions on the button; if the page displays a click count, screenshot verifying the count equals 5.

checkpoints.description: The product of the 5 numbers displayed after each button click is entered into the form input field on the task.html page.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the form input field containing the correct numerical product of the 5 numbers displayed during each button click.

success_rule: All required checkpoints are satisfied, with the product entered in the form being the accurate result of multiplying the 5 numbers displayed after each of the 5 button clicks.
